movie.title: Gangnam Blues (2015) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Korean] BluRay 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDrive
movie.synopsis: A “gangster noir” set in the 1970s, when Gangnam, Seoul goes under development. Political powers and darker organizations collide as they seek to grab control of the influential and exclusive area.
